/usr/bin/ar qc libfirestaff_m12.a CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/menu_startup_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/menu_startup_render_modern_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/menu_hit_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/config_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/asset_status_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/card_art_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/card_art_generated_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/branding_logo_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/branding_logo_readme_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/bestiary_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/creature_art_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/data_validator_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/changelog_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/theme_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/animated_bg_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/input_remap_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/save_browser_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/custom_dungeon_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/item_encyclopedia_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/campaign_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/spell_reference_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/map_viewer_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/music_jukebox_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/gamepad_config_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/touch_layout_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/presentation_preview_m12.c.o CMakeFiles/firestaff_m12.dir/screenshot_gallery_m12.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfirestaff_m12.a
